meaning_english: Walk / Move. Example: Ambulance (moving hospital), Preamble (walking before/introduction).
Heart. Example: Cardiac (relating to heart), Cardiology (study of heart).
Know / Aware. Example: Recognize (to know again), Cognitive (relating to mental action).
Against / Opposite. Example: Contradict (speak against), Counterfeit (fake/opposite of real).
Hidden / Secret. Example: Cryptic (mysterious), Cryptography (secret writing).
Good / Well / Pleasant. Example: Euphoria (intense happiness), Eulogy (good speech about someone).
Before / Front. Example: Forecast (predict before), Forehead (front of head).
Woman / Female. Example: Gynaecology (study of female health), Misogyny (hatred of women).
Different / Other. Example: Heterogeneous (diverse/different kinds), Heterodox (different from standard).
Same / Alike. Example: Homogeneous (of the same kind), Homophone (same sound).
Under / Below / Less. Example: Hypotension (low blood pressure), Hypodermic (under the skin).
Over / Above / Excessive. Example: Hypertension (high blood pressure), Hyperactive (overly active).
Between / Among. Example: International (between nations), Interfere (come between).
Within / Inside. Example: Intravenous (inside veins), Intrastate (within a state).
Great / Large. Example: Magnify (make large), Magnitude (great size).
Change / Beyond. Example: Metamorphosis (change of form), Metaphor (beyond literal meaning).
New / Recent. Example: Neologism (new word), Neolithic (new stone age).
Beside / Side by side. Example: Parallel (side by side), Parable (story told beside a truth).
Around / Surrounding. Example: Perimeter (distance around), Periscope (look around).
Many / Much. Example: Polygon (many sides), Polyglot (many languages).
After / Behind. Example: Postpone (put off until after), Post-war (after the war).
Before / In front. Example: Prefix (fixed before), Predict (say before).
False / Fake. Example: Pseudonym (false name), Pseudoscience (false science).
Backward / Past. Example: Retrospect (looking back), Retrograde (moving backward).
Under / Below. Example: Submarine (under sea), Substandard (below standard).
Above / Over / Better. Example: Superior (better than), Superhuman (above human).
Together / Same. Example: Symphony (sounds together), Synonym (same meaning).
Across / Beyond / Change. Example: Transport (carry across), Transform (change shape).
Beyond / Extreme. Example: Ultraviolet (beyond violet), Ultra-modern (extremely modern).
One / Single. Example: Universe (all in one), Unique (the only one).
